title: Slavic Cuisine
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds dishes from Slavic cuisine
body:
This mod complements Farmers Delight with dishes from Slavic cuisine.
---
- This mod currently adds:
    - Borscht
    - Rassolnik
    - Shchi
    - Ukha
    - Zurek
    - Compote

Note: I will add more foods and give textures nice, non-programmer art look in further updates.
